mapper.sql: id, title, description, difficulty, estimated_days, cover_image, course_count, `status`, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM learning_path WHERE `status` = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM learning_path WHERE `status` = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO learning_path (title, description, difficulty, estimated_days, cover_image, course_count, `status`, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{difficulty}, #{estimatedDays}, #{coverImage}, #{courseCount}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE learning_path SET course_count = #{count} WHERE id = #{id}
